findings.search_query: Thomas Phillips born 1667 Boston died Duxbury Rebecca Blaney genealogy
findings.source_title: Thomas Phillips & Rebecca Blaney (RootsWeb / megen reunion)
findings.snippet: Thomas and Rebecca Blaney married in Boston on December 31, 1702 by Mr. Cotton Mather; he died in Duxbury, MA on December 17 (year 1759). Children incl. Rebecca (b. ~25 Aug 1703), John (~1707), Blaney (10 Feb 1712).
findings.claimed_facts: Thomas Phillips m. Rebecca Blaney 31 Dec 1702 Boston (officiated by Cotton Mather); died Duxbury MA 17 Dec 1759. Matches worklist death date/place and spouse.
findings.notes: CONFLICT on birth year/parentage: WikiTree Phillips-6979 lists this Thomas as b. 1678 (not 1667) and connects to Duxbury; worklist parents 'Mary Haskins; Samuel Phillips' not corroborated. Multiple Thomas Phillips of Duxbury/Marshfield cause confusion (see Phillips Genealogies, archive.org). Marriage date 1702 with worklist birth 1667 would make him 35 at marriage - plausible. Treat birth 1667 and Haskins/Phillips parentage as unverified.

findings.search_query: Timothy Eaton 1709 Concord Massachusetts Sarah Hapgood Groton genealogy
findings.source_title: Vital Records of Concord, MA / History, genealogical and biographical, of the Eaton families (archive.org)
findings.snippet: Eaton and Hapgood families documented in Concord/Groton MA vital records and Eaton family genealogy. No direct confirmation of a Timothy Eaton b. 1709 with mother Sarah Hapgood found in snippets.
findings.claimed_facts: Eaton family present in Concord and Groton, Middlesex Co. MA in this era; Eaton-Hapgood family connections exist.
findings.notes: No specific record located for Timothy Eaton b. 20 Feb 1709 Concord, d. 20 Jul 1764 Groton. Worklist lists only a mother (Sarah Hapgood) and no spouse - sparse. Needs direct lookup in Eaton family genealogy (archive.org) and Concord/Groton VRs. Unverified.

findings.search_query: Timothy Titus Rehoboth Massachusetts 1692 Waitstill Garnsey genealogy
findings.source_title: Genealogy Data Page 130 / Rehoboth Families (Wheaton Wood)
findings.snippet: Timothy Titus born November 16, 1692, Rehoboth, Bristol, MA; married Waitstill Garnsey on June 27, 1717, in Swansea, Bristol, MA. Children incl. Patience, Nathaniell, Lydia Titus.
findings.claimed_facts: Timothy Titus b. 16 Nov 1692 Rehoboth MA; m. Waitstill Garnsey 27 Jun 1717 Swansea MA. Matches worklist birth date/place and spouse.
findings.notes: Birth date and spouse match worklist. Death (13 Jan 1777 Rehoboth) not directly confirmed in snippet. Web-tree level sourcing; would benefit from Rehoboth VR confirmation.

findings.search_query: William Dyer 1715 Truro Massachusetts Elizabeth Small Falmouth Maine genealogy
findings.source_title: William Dyer III (1715-aft.1765) | WikiTree
findings.snippet: William Dyer born 27 Mar 1715 in Truro, Barnstable, MA; died after 1765 in Falmouth, Cumberland, ME. Married Elizabeth Small on 6 Nov 1735 at Truro, MA. Children incl. William (1737), Levi (1738), Anthony (1744), Benjamin (1745), Daniel (1756 Falmouth).
findings.claimed_facts: William Dyer b. 27 Mar 1715 Truro MA; d. aft 1765 Falmouth ME; m. Elizabeth Small 6 Nov 1735 Truro. Matches worklist exactly (birth, death-aft-1765, place, spouse).
findings.notes: Strong match to worklist on all fields. Sourced to WikiTree, drawing on 'Descendants of Edward Small of New England' (Underhill, 1934). Family also has a Dr. William Dyer of Truro line - confirm not conflated.

findings.search_query: Timothy Titus Rehoboth Massachusetts 1692 Waitstill Garnsey genealogy
findings.source_title: Genealogy Data Page 130 (Descendancy Pages) / WikiTree Garnsey-19
findings.snippet: Waitstill Garnsey born February 8, 1693, in Milton, Norfolk, MA; married Timothy Titus on June 27, 1717, in Swansea, Bristol, MA; died 1768. Daughter of John Garnsey.
findings.claimed_facts: Waitstill Garnsey b. 8 Feb 1693 Milton MA; m. Timothy Titus 27 Jun 1717 Swansea; d. 1768. Matches worklist (birth, spouse, death year 1768).
findings.notes: Birth/marriage/death-year match worklist. Father John Garnsey (Guernsey) noted (WikiTree Garnsey-19). Web-tree sourcing.

findings.search_query: William Chase 1688 Yarmouth Harwich Massachusetts Dorcas Baker genealogy
findings.source_title: William Chase (1668-1771) | WikiTree (Chase-892); Miner Descent 'William Chase III'
findings.snippet: Married Dorcas (Baker) Chase 20 September 1715 in Yarmouth; died Sep 1771 at about age 87 in Harwich, Barnstable, MA; parents John Chase Sr. and Elizabeth (Baker) Chase. Second wife Patience Walker m. 15 Oct 1747. Quaker; settled west side of Herring River, Harwich.
findings.claimed_facts: William Chase m. Dorcas Baker 20 Sep 1715 Yarmouth; d. Sep 1771 Harwich MA; parents John Chase Sr. & Elizabeth Baker. Death and spouse match worklist.
findings.notes: CONFLICT on birth year: WikiTree gives 'about 8 Jul 1684 [uncertain]' and biography text says 8 Jul 1668, while worklist says 8 Jul 1688. Day/month (8 Jul) consistent, year disputed across sources. Death (Sep 1771 Harwich) and spouse Dorcas Baker firmly match. Dorcas b. 15 Nov 1696, d. of smallpox 1745 (Find a Grave 103929743).

findings.search_query: William Morris Webb 1716 Stamford Connecticut Sarah Scofield Egremont genealogy
findings.source_title: Descendants of Richard Webb / Stamford CT records (CTGenWeb)
findings.snippet: William Webb born April 8, 1716 in Stamford, Connecticut. Extensive Webb-Scofield intermarriage in Stamford (e.g. Joseph Webb m. Hannah Scofield 1672).
findings.claimed_facts: A William Webb b. 8 Apr 1716 Stamford CT is attested; Webb and Scofield families intermarried in Stamford. Partial match to worklist birth date/place.
findings.notes: Birth date/place plausibly confirmed, but no source directly tying this William to wife Sarah Scofield, to North Egremont MA death (19 Nov 1798), or to parents Jonathan Webb / Judith Chamberlain. The 'Morris' middle name unverified. Needs Webb genealogy + Egremont/Berkshire records.

findings.search_query: Rev. Nathaniel Rogers Ipswich 1670 Portsmouth New Hampshire minister genealogy
findings.source_title: Nathaniel Rogers (minister) / Rogers Family of Ipswich (Historic Ipswich, rjohara.net)
findings.snippet: Nathaniel Rogers, born in Ipswich MA 1669/1670, served as Minister in Portsmouth NH 1699-1723. Part of the Rogers ministerial line descending from Rev. Nathaniel Rogers (1598-1655) of Ipswich.
findings.claimed_facts: Rev. Nathaniel Rogers b. ~1669/1670 Ipswich MA; minister at Portsmouth NH 1699-1723; d. 1723 Portsmouth. Matches worklist birth/death place and dates.
findings.notes: Birth (Ipswich 1669/70), Portsmouth ministry, and death (1723 Portsmouth) align with worklist. Worklist middle name 'Denison' and father 'John Crane Rogers' not confirmed in snippets; the well-documented line runs Rev. Nathaniel (1598-1655) > John > Nathaniel. Verify generation/parentage. MAYFLOWER tag unverified here.

findings.search_query: Abigail Phillips 1771 Duxbury died 1871 Unity Maine Leonard Asa Phillips Cynthia Southworth
findings.source_title: Abigail Leonard (Phillips) (1770 - 1871) - Geni
findings.snippet: Abigail Phillips (b. ~1770-1771), daughter of Asa Phillips and Cynthia Phillips (born Southworth); died December 16, 1871 in Unity, Maine; married John Leonard. Siblings incl. Mary, Ruth, Lucy (Hall), Southworth, Cynthia, Huldah (Stackpole).
findings.claimed_facts: Abigail Phillips dau. of Asa Phillips & Cynthia Southworth; m. John Leonard; d. 16 Dec 1871 Unity, ME. Matches worklist parents, spouse surname (Leonard), and death date/place.
findings.notes: Strong match on parents, death date/place, and spouse (John Leonard - worklist had only 'Leonard'). Birth place listed by Geni as Massachusetts generally rather than Duxbury specifically (minor discrepancy). Web-tree (Geni) sourcing.

findings.search_query: Dorothy Folsom 1775 Exeter NH Nathaniel Gilman daughter Nathaniel Folsom genealogy
findings.source_title: Nathaniel Folsom - Wikipedia / A genealogy of the Folsom family (archive.org)
findings.snippet: Maj. Gen. Nathaniel Folsom of Exeter NH; children included Dorothy. Folsom daughters married into the Gilman family (Deborah and Mary both married Gov. John Taylor Gilman). Nathaniel Folsom m. first Dorothy Smith (1726-1776).
findings.claimed_facts: Dorothy Folsom was a daughter of Maj. Gen. Nathaniel Folsom of Exeter NH; Folsom-Gilman marriage connections well documented.
findings.notes: CONFLICT/CAUTION: A daughter Dorothy of Nathaniel Folsom is attested, but Wikipedia lists Nathaniel's children with first wife Dorothy Smith and gives no Dorothy b. 1775. Worklist mother 'Mary Stoodley (Fisher)' would be Nathaniel's 2nd wife - so a Dorothy b. 1775 by the 2nd wife is plausible but unconfirmed. Spouse 'Nathaniel Gilman' (not Gov. John Taylor Gilman) needs verification. Confirm in Folsom Genealogy (archive.org genealogyoffolso00chap).

findings.search_query: Eunice Read 1783 Freeport Maine Jonathan Bagley Troy Waldo Maine genealogy
findings.source_title: John Bagley (1810-1871) - Find a Grave Memorial
findings.snippet: John Bagley, son of Jonathan & Eunice Read, buried in Mount Holly Cemetery, Troy, Waldo County, Maine. Born Troy 22 Apr 1810.
findings.claimed_facts: Eunice Read was wife of Jonathan Bagley and mother of John Bagley (b. 1810 Troy ME); family seated at Troy, Waldo Co., ME. Confirms spouse and Troy residence per worklist.
findings.notes: Spouse (Jonathan Bagley) and Troy ME location confirmed via son's Find a Grave memorial. Eunice's own birth (1783 Freeport), father Abram Read, and death (1868 Troy) not directly confirmed in snippets. Find a Grave snippet only.

findings.search_query: John Cromwell 1778 New York Elizabeth Van Deusen Harmonus Cromwell Catrina Pickard genealogy
findings.source_title: Cromwell / Van Deusen Genealogy (WikiTree); MyHeritage John Cromwell
findings.snippet: A person born 19 Nov 1778 in New York is indexed; an Elizabeth Van Deusen b. 18 Jul 1778 in Albany NY appears in records. No record directly linking John Cromwell (parents Harmonus Janse Cromwell & Catrina Pickard) to wife Elizabeth Van Deusen located.
findings.claimed_facts: Possible John Cromwell b. ~1778 NY and an Elizabeth Van Deusen b. 1778 Albany NY exist as separate index entries; not confirmed as the same family unit.
findings.notes: No solid match. Index entries are coincidental, not corroborated as this couple. Worklist parents (Harmonus Janse Cromwell, Catrina Pickard) unverified. Needs direct WikiTree/Dutch NY records lookup.

findings.snippet: Knowles family of Eastham MA genealogy and Readfield Kennebec Co. ME records exist; no direct snippet match for John Franklin Knowles b. 1784 Readfield, wife Catherine Sprague, father Simon K. Knowles.
findings.claimed_facts: Knowles family present in Readfield/Kennebec ME region; no direct confirmation of this individual located.
findings.notes: No specific record found. Worklist parents Simon K. Knowles and Lydia Rachel Fuller, spouse Catherine Sprague, Troy ME death 1873 all unverified. Knowles family of Eastham genealogy (archive.org) is the recommended next source.

findings.search_query: John Sutherland 1735 Rogart Sutherland Scotland Isobel MacKay genealogy
findings.source_title: Rogart parish records (oldscottish.com) / Sutherland genealogy (RootsWeb)
findings.snippet: Sutherland and MacKay families documented in Rogart parish, Sutherland, Scotland. MacKay family of Tannachy in Rogart noted. No specific record for John Sutherland b. 1735 m. Isobel MacKay located.
findings.claimed_facts: Sutherland and MacKay families confirmed present in Rogart, Sutherland, Scotland in this era.
findings.notes: No specific match. 'John Sutherland' in Rogart is an extremely common name; OPR records pre-1735 are sparse. Worklist gives only an approximate 1735 birth and spouse (Isobel MacKay/Nin Rob Mac Emish). Needs Rogart OPR direct search; very low confidence any single match is correct.

findings.search_query: Jonathan Bagley 1782 Maine died 1881 Troy Waldo Enoch Bagley Miriam Hoyt genealogy / findagrave
findings.source_title: John Bagley (1810-1871) - Find a Grave Memorial
findings.snippet: John Bagley son of Jonathan & Eunice Read, Mount Holly Cemetery, Troy, Waldo County, Maine.
findings.claimed_facts: Jonathan Bagley m. Eunice Read; resided Troy, Waldo Co., ME; father of John Bagley (b. 1810 Troy). Confirms spouse and Troy residence per worklist.
findings.notes: Spouse (Eunice Read) and Troy ME location confirmed via son's memorial. CAUTION: a different Jonathan Bagley (1769-1853, b. Candia NH, d. Searsmont/Searsport ME, m. Elizabeth Hall) appears in Find a Grave 64808939 - do not conflate. Worklist Jonathan b. 1782, d. 1881 Troy, parents Enoch Bagley Sr & Miriam Hoyt - birth/death/parents unverified.

findings.search_query: Joseph Files 1786 Gorham Maine died Thorndike Samuel Files Esther Thomes genealogy
findings.source_title: Joseph Files (1786 - 1870) - Geni
findings.snippet: Joseph Files (1786 - 1870) Geni profile. Gorham, Maine earlier records (Marquis Fayette King, 1897) document Files and Thomes families in Gorham.
findings.claimed_facts: Joseph Files b. 1786, d. 1870, profile exists; matches worklist birth/death years. Files & Thomes families documented in Gorham ME.
findings.notes: Birth/death years match worklist (1786-1870). Geni profile not fully read (blocked). Parents Samuel Files / Esther Thomes and spouses (Anna Swert, Margaret Wescott, Sarah Morton), Thorndike ME death not directly confirmed in snippet. Gorham VR (King 1897) recommended.

NOTE worklist shows spouse also surnamed Gerrish (Lydia Gerrish) - possible cousin marriage, verify. Vital Records of Lebanon ME (archive.org) is next source.

findings.search_query: Margaret/Peggy Wescott 1790 Gorham Maine Reuben Wescott Abigail Dame Joseph Files
findings.source_title: Eleanor Sawyer (Wescott) - Geni (sibling); Wescott family genealogy
findings.snippet: Peggy Files (born Wescott), daughter of Reuben Wescott and Abigail Wescott (born Dam) of Gorham, Cumberland, Maine; siblings Eleanor, John, Reuben Jr., William, Sally, Polly (Mary), Betsey. Sibling Eleanor b. 21 Mar 1795 Gorham to same parents.
findings.claimed_facts: Margaret 'Peggy' Wescott dau. of Reuben Wescott & Abigail (Dam/Dame) of Gorham ME; married a Files. Matches worklist parents and spouse (Joseph Files).
findings.notes: Parents (Reuben Wescott & Abigail Dam/Dame) and spouse surname (Files) confirmed via Geni family group. Birth 1790 and Thorndike ME death 1827 not directly confirmed in snippet. Web-tree (Geni) sourcing; consistent with worklist.

findings.source_title: Robert Little (1780-1853) - Geni; Maine marriage indexes
findings.snippet: No match found for Martha Gerry b. ~1831 ME, spouse Chester B Gerry, parents Robert G Little & Sarah Stevens. A different Martha Little (dau. of Robert & Catherine Little) was b. 1833 in Coosa Co., Alabama - not this person.
findings.claimed_facts: No confirming source located.
findings.notes: No solid hit. The Robert Little / Martha results point to an Alabama family, not Maine - not a match. Worklist data (b. abt 1831 ME, spouse Chester B Gerry, parents Robert G Little & Sarah Stevens) unverified. Likely needs 1850/1860 Maine census + Maine VRs.
